articles.title_en: TASS: The EU paid the maximum amount in more than a year for Russian LNG in March

articles.title_en: TASS: The EU reduced purchases of Russian pipeline gas and LNG in the first quarter
articles.lead_en: During this period, EU countries purchased Russian pipeline gas for €1.2 billion, and LNG for €2 billion

articles.title_en: A 14-year-old girl vanished in Russia after a drone strike burned her family’s home to the ground. Her body was never found.
